name: Content Media Studio
description: 自媒体内容工作室基因组：选题策划→内容创作→审核优化→分发运营，4 人全流程协作

config_override.description: A content media studio genome bundling 4 role-specific genes for topic planning, content creation, review/optimization, and multi-platform distribution. Install the full genome to get all roles, or install individual genes for specific agents.

topology_recommendation.description: Hub-and-spoke layout around the blackboard, with workflow connections between adjacent roles
